MASTER CALENDAR JURY

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-04-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Arnold W. Evje, Esq. for Plaintiff Tenderloin Health. Property manager Richard May.
Annie K. Chan, Esq., limited scope attorney for and with defendant John Wells.

Settlement conference held. Case Settled. Parties created written stipulation for judgment regarding property located at 64 Turk Street, #502. Judgment pursuant to stipulation stayed until February 24, 2009. See scanned document for details. Trial date vacated.

Judge Pro Tem Will Chen, Clerk Garth Sayers, Not reported. (218)
